name: Uniswap v3 LP Rebalancer
description: Monitor a Uniswap v3 concentrated-liquidity position on Base. When the price moves out of the configured range, decreaseLiquidity + collect fees + burn the position NFT to drain assets back to your EOA. **Phase 1 (current):** drain-and-stop — auto-mint of a new position is a documented stub; you re-stake manually. Phase 2 will wire up automatic re-mint per the recipe. Hard cap on total deposited USD enforced.
author: holonym-foundation

envVars.description: Uniswap v3 NonfungiblePositionManager NFT token id of the position to manage
Hard cap on total deposited USD when reopening positions (no default — must be user-set)
Tick range half-width around the current tick when reopening (raw tick units; default 500 ≈ ±2.5% on a 1.0001-tick grid)
Maximum slippage tolerated on decreaseLiquidity, in basis points (default 200 = 2%). Bounds attacker-controlled value loss during the unwind
Base RPC endpoint used by viem for on-chain reads (positions, slot0). Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org
Dry-run mode (default ON). Submit transactions live ONLY when set to the literal string '0'. Any other value (including blank, 'true', '1') keeps the agent in dry-run.
